sentence_reviews.text: A vector field is learned to transport samples from a simple base distribution to data along probability paths.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. Flow Matching paper, abstract and method: learns continuous normalizing flow vector fields over probability paths from simple/noise distributions to data.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition closely matches the cited paper's framing.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Flow matching & transport objectives is to connect Generative modeling, Differential equations to downstream capabilities including Continuous normalizing flows & learned vector fields, Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. Flow Matching paper, abstract and introduction on CNFs, vector fields, probability paths, and generative modeling.
sentence_reviews.notes: Generative modeling, vector fields, and CNFs are supported; rectified-flow/downstream graph wording is broader synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Continuous normalizing flows & learned vector fields
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. Flow Matching paper, training continuous normalizing flows via learned vector fields.
sentence_reviews.notes: The source directly supports CNFs and learned vector fields.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. Flow Matching paper, flow matching for continuous normalizing flows and probability paths.
sentence_reviews.notes: Normalizing and flow-matching models are supported; rectified-flow models are not directly established by the cited packet source.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Differential equations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. Flow Matching paper, regression objective for training CNFs and probability-path/vector-field formulation.
sentence_reviews.notes: The dependencies are supported, but the objective-mismatch limitation is generic and not directly supported by the cited source.

sentence_reviews.text: Flow matching & transport objectives uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. Flow Matching paper title, abstract, and experiments frame the method for generative modeling.
sentence_reviews.notes: The paper directly identifies flow matching as a generative modeling method.

sentence_reviews.text: Flow matching & transport objectives uses Differential equations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. Flow Matching paper, continuous normalizing flows defined through vector fields/ODE dynamics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Continuous flows via vector fields directly support the differential-equations dependency.

sentence_reviews.text: Flow matching & transport objectives uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. Flow Matching paper, probability paths between noise/base and data distributions.
sentence_reviews.notes: Probability paths and distributions directly support this dependency.

sentence_reviews.text: Flow matching & transport objectives uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. Flow Matching paper, objective for fitting vector fields by regression.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited paper directly describes optimizing/training the flow-matching objective.

edge_reviews.notes: Flow matching is explicitly for generative modeling; core strength is supported.
The CNF/vector-field formulation supports a core differential-equations dependency.
Probability paths and distributions are directly supported; common strength is defensible relative to generative/differential-equation core.
Training by a regression objective supports the optimization edge; common strength is appropriate.
